citations.narrative:
Numerous flies were present in the outdoor food preparation area and near the entrance to an indoor food storage
building. Fly traps were present; however, they were not efficiently removing unwanted flies. Flies or other pests may
contaminate the animal food supplies and potentially spread disease. A safe and effective program for the control of
insects, ectoparasites, and avian and mammalian pests must be established and maintained.
Correct by 04/21/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
Additional Inspectors:
ALEXANDRA ANDRICOS, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

narrative:
3.131(d) 
   
Sanitation. 
Numerous flies were present in the outdoor food preparation area and near the entrance to an indoor food storage 
building. Fly traps were present; however, they were not efficiently removing unwanted flies. Flies or other pests may 
contaminate the animal food supplies and potentially spread disease. A safe and effective program for the control of 
insects, ectoparasites, and avian and mammalian pests must be established and maintained. 
 
Correct by 04/21/2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
ALEXANDRA ANDRICOS, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n
